query:
SELECT m.id, m.scientific_name, m.indication, t.trade_name 
FROM medications m 
LEFT JOIN trade_names t ON t.medication_id = m.id 
WHERE LOWER(t.trade_name) LIKE '%dayvigo%' 
LIMIT 10;
